results.title: Michigan mall shooting leaves 2 dead, 1 wounded
results.description: DEARBORN, Mich. — Dearborn's Fairlane Town Center erupted in chaos Friday afternoon after a shooting left two people dead and one injured. Dearborn Police Chief Issa Shahin said officers responded to the shooting at the mall on Michigan Avenue around...

results.title: Evacuation alert issued for wildfire north of Boston Bar
results.description: The Brunswick Creek wildfire, discovered on July 2, is now 14 hectares and deemed out of control
